name: Decorative Canvas Storage Bin with Faux Leather Strap Handles Cream/Tan - Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia
description:
Keep your home looking beautiful and elegantly organized with the Decorative Canvas Storage Bin with Faux Leather Strap Handles from Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia. This cream-hue storage bin is designed in a rectangular shape with an open top. It includes faux-leather strap handles for convenient lifting and moving from one place to another. You can place this functional storage bin on a shelf or any other spot for organization.

Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia: Gather • Create • Enjoy
